name: Hot Cabbage Salad - {Warmer Krautsalat}
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred and wash the cabbage thoroughly. Drain very well.
2. Place the drained cabbage in a large bowl and sprinkle with a little salt.
3. Cover the cabbage completely with boiling water. Cover the bowl and let stand for 1 hour.
4. In a skillet, fry bacon until crisp.
5. In a small saucepan, heat vinegar until hot.
6. Drain the cabbage and place it in a bowl or on individual plates.
7. Pour the hot vinegar over the cabbage.
8. Season with salt, pepper, and caraway seeds.
9. Add the bacon and drizzle with hot bacon fat.
10. Serve immediately. This recipe serves 4 to 6.
Comments:
This German recipe can be served as a first-course salad or as a vegetable side dish with grilled or roast meat. The success of this easy salad depends on the bacon and vinegar being very hot when poured over the cabbage.
